01 / Jirasak Eakchantuek

Profile / Bangkok, Thailand

Developer

An Information Technology student passionate about web and software development. I continuously build full-stack skills across JavaScript, C#, HTML, CSS, and databases. I work well in teams, learn quickly, and enjoy applying new knowledge to real projects and internships.
